pi_items.source: Verified via task description, export_result.sh title search regex, and verifier.py checks.
Verified via task description and verifier.py tag checks.
Verified via export_result.sh simulated state injection and verifier.py widget regex checks.
Verified via setup_task.sh (where the 5 seeded tiddlers are assigned this tag) and verifier.py filter checks.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a TiddlyWiki dashboard titled 'Drug Interaction Finder' with the tag 'Dashboard'. The search logic must filter tiddlers tagged 'DrugPaper' and dynamically bind to the temporary state tiddler '$:/temp/drug-search'. The test environment dynamically injects 5 synthetic drug interaction papers during setup to test the functionality.
